Felipe Carvajal Brown

Professional in Numerical Simulations and Computer Science. Specialist in interdisciplinary relationships between technical and commercial departments. Knowledgeable in research projects and translation techniques. Proactive, rigorous, and meticulous; capable of performing diverse functions efficiently. Excellent communication skills with clients, colleagues, and superiors. Team-oriented with a high level of attention to detail.

Software engineer, MSc in Numerical Simulations. Rust, Python, TypeScript. I build public-interest tools, for free. Open to work. Santiago, Chile + remote.

69 Repos
22 Followers
39 Following
github.com/fcarvajalbrown

Latest Repositories

Open source from GitHub

Keel public

Automatic mixing and mastering for finished stems. A deterministic, open-source Python engine that loudness-balances stems into a stereo mix and masters it to an exact LUFS target with a true-peak limiter (ITU-R BS.1770-4). Same stems in, same master out — no AI, no subscription.

Python 0 0 4 days ago
GEODESIC-M public

Deterministic Protein Manifold Simulator — a physics-based, classical mechanics engine for mapping protein conformational energy landscapes.

Rust 0 0 1 week ago
Probator public

Probator — a desktop cockpit for writing scholarly papers where the human pilots and citation fabrication is structurally impossible. A Win98-skinned Flet app with a live Citation Firewall against OpenAlex, Crossref, and Semantic Scholar.

Python 0 0 1 week ago
VisualRS public

No description provided.

Rust 0 0 1 week ago
MuniANCI public

Escáner de cumplimiento de ciberseguridad para organismos del Estado chileno, alineado a Ley 21.663; y las Instrucciones Generales de la ANCI. Combina escaneo activo de red con un cuestionario declarativo para producir un informe de brechas en PDF y un reporte JSON listo para CSIRT Chile.

Rust 2 0 1 week ago
Nano-FII public

Minimalist Python-to-Zig FFI bridge. 79ns call overhead via comptime trampolines — 4x faster than ctypes

Zig 0 0 1 week ago
Symbio-Grid public

An evolutionary mycelial automaton. Plant and fungi agents trade resources and mutate their rule-tables across generations until a stable bio-economy emerges — or collapses. Two programs, one repo.

Python 0 0 2 weeks ago
MuniGPT public

Asistente de inteligencia artificial local para municipios chilenos. Funciona completamente sin conexión a internet para la operación principal. Ningún dato institucional sale del equipo.

Python 0 0 2 weeks ago
MaskOps public

High-speed PII masking as a Polars plugin — powered by Rust

Python 18 0 2 weeks ago
Segovia public

A fast, memory-bounded Rust engine for electrophysiology signal processing — Neuropixels-scale, callable from Python.

HTML 0 0 2 weeks ago
Agentic-CS-Paper-Makers public

A CLI-first, GUI-ready multi-agent workflow for producing structured computer science and game theory papers. Go orchestrator + embedded Python LLM bridge.

Go 0 0 2 weeks ago
Entropy-Collapse-Simulator public

Calibration-free structural robustness index (R_S) from the Shannon entropy of strain energy, for planar steel frames and trusses under the alternate-load-path (member-removal) method. Verified Python finite-element solver with a progressive-collapse criteria comparison.

Python 1 1 2 weeks ago
Per-Astra public

A Duolingo-style app that teaches developers Claude and the Anthropic stack through gamified daily exercises, a skill tree, and shareable certifications. Flutter, open source.

Dart 0 0 4 weeks ago
brown-fps-creator-showcase public

Brown FPS Creator - a no-code, visual first-person shooter game maker for Windows, Linux, and Steam Deck. Build a complete FPS without writing code.

pipeonjoy public

SentinelNode public

Self-hosted security dashboard — scans directories for leaked secrets and audits HTTP security headers. Powered by Rust and Node.js, deployable with Docker Compose.

TypeScript 0 0 2 months ago
Cobolarium public

A friendly desktop app that lets anyone write COBOL, hit Run, and see real mainframe output — without owning a mainframe, knowing JCL, or paying IBM.

0 0 2 months ago
DiskChurn public

Fast, single-scan Windows disk analyzer in Rust. Reads the NTFS Master File Table directly to classify folders by growth behavior, project when your disk will fill up, estimate compression savings via Shannon entropy, and compare snapshots over time — all in one native egui window.

Rust 0 0 2 months ago
somoselmejorpais public

Dashboard satírico que celebra la identidad nacional chilena. Agrega rankings reales e inventados y los presenta como victorias nacionales irrefutables.

book-agent public

LangGraph pipeline that turns a Markdown book draft into a Lulu-compliant PDF.

Python 0 0 3 months ago
PulsOS public

A live process monitor for macOS — built in plain C with SDL2, Dear ImGui, and Metal. Treemap view, sortable process list, per-PID sparklines, CPU heatmap. No Electron. No Python. No abstractions you didn't write yourself. Optimized for the Apple M4 unified memory architecture.

C 0 0 3 months ago
USM-Pygame public

Plataforma de aprendizaje de Python y POO mediante juegos Atari rotos. Desarrollado para primer año de Ingeniería en Diseño de Videojuegos, Universidad Santa María.

Auth4Free public

A secure, modular authentication library for Rust applications. Features password validation, JWT tokens, bcrypt hashing, and comprehensive security tools. Perfect for developers building secure web services and APIs.
